title: Velvety Festive German Lamb Sausage
description: A tangy, velvety, and festive German dish featuring ground coriander, ideal for a weeknight dinner or as a special occasion dish.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine lamb mince, onion, garlic, ground coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg and a pinch of salt.
Add the egg mixture to the lamb mixture and mix well.
Add the Panko breadcrumbs and mix until just combined.
Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat a large non-stick pan over medium heat and add the olive oil.
Using a spoon, shape the mixture into small patties and add to the pan.
Cook for 3-4 minutes per side or until the sausage is cooked through.
Transfer the sausage to a plate and set aside.
Add the red wine to the pan and simmer for 1-2 minutes.
Return the sausage to the pan and simmer for a further 2-3 minutes.
Serve the sausage on a plate garnished with breadcrumbs and a side of your choice.
